note: seq=132: BUILD the missing Tier-2 deep-crawl email worker (the reason email coverage is stuck at 6.7% -- the ladder note says it was never built). CANARY: BATCH=40 records, --selftest gated. For website-having no-email records it crawls homepage+/contact+/about+/team, extracts REAL emails at the company's own domain (junk like webmaster@/noreply@ excluded), MX-validates, writes email + clears qa_status so the record re-qualifies. Additive, idempotent (deepcrawl_at flag). Measure emails_found, then scale + timer.
